utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan describes comprehensive physical and mental health features and provides costs: base ~€745/month plus wellness add-on €200/month. This satisfies coverage and costs.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided: home and contents at €60/month with replacement value protection and add-ons. Satisfies.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Provided: €50/month, covers trip cancellations and emergency medical support, optional concierge. Satisfies.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided: Family Therapy €180/month, Alternative Therapy €160/month, Premium Membership €20/month, optional one-time portfolio service €300. Satisfies.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided monthly breakdown summing components to ~€1,415/month; however, no annual figure is given. The requirement says monthly/annual cost breakdown, which can be interpreted as either monthly or annual; since a complete monthly breakdown is provided, this should satisfy the requirement.
Thus, all 5 items are included and sufficiently specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes specific products by name that also appear in the ground-truth ratings. Map each selected item to its exact rating from the dataset: Health: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical) and includes Wellness Programs add-on; Property: LifeFirst Standard Coverage; Travel: LifeFirst Standard Plan; Additional services: Family Therapy Coverage and Alternative Therapy Coverage; General services: Premium Insurance Membership and Insurance Portfolio Management. For each, use the corresponding rating under the correct section of the ground-truth.

final_package_text:
{
  "health_coverage": "LifeFirst Standard Plan designed for comprehensive physical and mental health needs – including 24/7 support, telemedicine, gym reimbursement, and stress management with a Wellness Programs add-on (costing approximately €200/month) built in for enhanced anxiety and cardiovascular care. The base premium for this plan has been adjusted to around €745/month.",
  "property_coverage": "LifeFirst Standard Coverage for home and contents at €60/month, offering comprehensive replacement value protection plus smart home device add-ons.",
  "travel_coverage": "LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel insurance at €50/month, which covers trip cancellations and emergency medical support along with optional concierge services.",
  "additional_services": "Executive and family transition enhancements including Family Therapy Coverage (€180/month) and Alternative Therapy Coverage (€160/month), plus a Premium Insurance Membership at €20/month to leverage company benefits (offering a 15% discount on policies and enhanced advisory support). There is also an optional one-time Insurance Portfolio Management service for €300 to support annual audits and fine-tuning.",
  "total_budget": "The recommended portfolio is optimized to align with the current family coverage spending of approximately €1,415/month: Base health (approx. €745) + add-on health enhancements (total of €200 + €180 + €160 = €540) + property (€60) + travel (€50) + membership (€20) = ~€1,415/month."
}
